name: @idevconn/create-icore
description: Bootstrap a new project from the iCore scaffold (Nx + NestJS + React + Vite + shadcn/Tailwind, swappable auth + storage providers).
author: iDEVconn

scripts.smoke: npm run build && node scripts/snapshot-templates.mjs && node scripts/smoke-scaffold.mjs --mode=link --projects=shared,firebase-admin,auth,upload,notes,api
scripts.smoke:run: npm run build && node scripts/snapshot-templates.mjs && node scripts/smoke-scaffold.mjs --mode=install --run --projects=shared,firebase-admin,auth,upload,notes,api --services=api,auth,upload,notes
scripts.prepublishOnly: node scripts/snapshot-templates.mjs && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
